catDesc: Explore a selection of handcrafted sushi featuring fresh seafood, perfectly seasoned rice, and authentic Japanese flavors.

items.title: Salmon Nigiri
items.desc: Fresh slices of salmon served over seasoned sushi rice.

items.title: Tuna Nigiri
items.desc: Premium tuna paired with perfectly seasoned rice.

items.title: Ebi Nigiri
items.desc: Sweet shrimp nigiri topped with a touch of wasabi.

items.title: Tamago Nigiri
items.desc: Japanese sweet omelet served on sushi rice.

items.title: Unagi Nigiri
items.desc: Grilled freshwater eel glazed with sweet soy sauce.

catDesc: Discover our chef-inspired rolls, combining fresh ingredients, bold flavors, and beautiful presentation in every bite.

items.title: Dragon Roll
items.desc: Shrimp tempura roll topped with avocado and eel sauce.

items.title: Tokyo Crunch Roll
items.desc: Crispy tempura flakes, crab, cucumber, and spicy mayo.

items.title: Rainbow Roll
items.desc: California roll topped with assorted fresh fish.

items.title: Spicy Salmon Roll
items.desc: Fresh salmon mixed with spicy sauce and cucumber.

items.title: California Roll
items.desc: Classic roll with crab, avocado, and cucumber.

catDesc: From crispy bites to savory classics, our appetizers are designed to awaken your appetite before the main course.

items.title: Gyoza
items.desc: Pan-fried Japanese dumplings filled with seasoned chicken.

items.title: Edamame
items.desc: Steamed soybeans lightly seasoned with sea salt.

items.title: Chicken Karaage
items.desc: Japanese-style crispy fried chicken served with lemon.

items.title: Takoyaki
items.desc: Savory octopus balls topped with bonito flakes.

items.title: Agedashi Tofu
items.desc: Lightly fried tofu served in savory dashi broth.

catDesc: Enjoy our carefully crafted ramen bowls, featuring slow-simmered broths, tender toppings, and traditional Japanese flavors.

items.title: Tonkotsu Ramen
items.desc: Rich pork bone broth with chashu pork and soft-boiled egg.

items.title: Shoyu Ramen
items.desc: Traditional soy sauce broth with sliced pork and scallions.

items.title: Miso Ramen
items.desc: Savory miso broth served with vegetables and pork.

items.title: Spicy Ramen
items.desc: Bold spicy broth with tender chicken and vegetables.

catDesc: Experience the finest creations from our kitchen, featuring seasonal ingredients and customer-favorite specialties.

items.title: Tokyo Premium Set
items.desc: Chef's selection of sushi, rolls, and seasonal specialties.

items.title: Sashimi Deluxe
items.desc: Fresh assortment of premium salmon, tuna, and white fish.

items.title: Wagyu Rice Bowl
items.desc: Tender grilled wagyu beef served over steamed rice.

catDesc: Complete your dining experience with refreshing teas, specialty drinks, and handcrafted beverages inspired by Japanese culture.

items.title: Matcha Latte
items.desc: Creamy Japanese green tea latte with rich matcha flavor.

items.title: Iced Matcha
items.desc: Refreshing iced matcha served with lightly sweetened milk.

items.title: Yuzu Soda
items.desc: Sparkling citrus drink with sweet and tangy yuzu.

items.title: Japanese Green Tea
items.desc: Traditional hot green tea brewed from premium leaves.
